questions.question: Can advanced AI systems autonomously develop and implement novel scientific theories that outperform human researchers within the next decade?
questions.why_it_matters: If AI can autonomously advance science, it would revolutionize research productivity and the allocation of scientific resources.

questions.question: Will quantum computing achieve practical error-corrected quantum advantage for real-world applications within the next 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Practical quantum advantage would disrupt cryptography, optimization, and materials science, requiring massive shifts in tech infrastructure and security.
signals_to_watch: industry investment spikes in quantum computing

questions.question: Is a large-scale, multi-nation conflict involving nuclear weapons more likely than not within the next 30 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Such conflict would drastically alter global power structures, economies, and human survival strategies.

questions.question: Will decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs) replace traditional government functions in at least one major country within 20 years?
questions.why_it_matters: A shift to DAO governance would redefine political power, legal systems, and citizen engagement worldwide.
signals_to_watch: major public services managed by DAOs

questions.question: Will AI-driven automation cause a net global decrease in total human employment within the next 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: A net decline in jobs due to automation would require fundamental economic restructuring and social safety nets.
signals_to_watch: global employment statistics vs automation rates

questions.question: Can gene editing therapies reliably cure the top five genetic diseases in humans within the next 10 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Effective cures would transform healthcare, reduce long-term costs, and improve quality of life globally.

questions.question: Will global net carbon emissions reach net zero before 2050 through current or emerging technologies and policies?
questions.why_it_matters: Achieving net zero is critical to limit catastrophic climate impacts and guide investment and policy decisions.
signals_to_watch: adoption rates of clean energy technologies

questions.question: Will immersive virtual reality platforms become the primary medium for social interaction among young adults globally within 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: This would reshape social norms, identity formation, and media consumption patterns on a massive scale.
signals_to_watch: market share of VR social platforms
